titles.title: At the Cross You Lay Down Your Life

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Who am I that you would reach out your hand Who am I that you would give me strength to stand A sinner such as me so unworthy and unclean I should have been the one they crucified

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: But at the cross You lay down your life So I could find mine I've never known a love like this before You hung on a tree and there you though of me And all I can say is who am I

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Who am I that you would look on me with love All my stains have been covered by your blood Saved by Grace through faith when you came you made a way Now who so ever will may come and be free

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Now I realise the situation Crying out in desperation Here on my knees I'm giving you all of me
